---
name: ⚡ Performance Improvement
about: Suggest optimizations or document slow pathways.
title: 'perf: '
labels: 'type: performance'

---

## Description of Performance Issues

Describe the latency, memory leak, or compute overhead detected.

## Target Area

Which app/package is affected (e.g. `@repo/worker` task execution).

## Suggested Optimization

Outline the proposed solution (e.g. caching strategies, indexing, thread pooling).

## Benchmarks/Logs

Add any profile data, load testing results, or metrics if available.
